data.name: home_title
data.value:
AI builds your demos.
AI personalizes your demos.
AI closes your deals.

data.name: home_subtitle
data.value: Capture your product. AI creates interactive demos, personalizes them for every prospect, and tells you who's ready to buy.

data.name: home_use_cases_title
data.value: Demos for every stage of the buyer journey

data.name: home_uc1_desc
data.value: Let visitors experience your product before talking to sales. Replace static screenshots with interactive, persona-specific tours.

data.name: home_uc2_desc
data.value: Send personalized demo links within minutes of a discovery call. Each prospect sees their own version.

data.name: home_uc3_desc
data.value: Replace 'Request a Demo' with 'Take a Tour'. Convert ad traffic with instant interactive experiences.

data.name: home_uc4_desc
data.value: Let prospects explore your product before the sales call. Qualify interest and identify their use case automatically.

data.name: home_uc5_desc
data.value: Give champions a demo they can share internally. Help them sell your product inside their organization.

data.name: home_uc6_desc
data.value: Self-serve product tours for new customers. Reduce time-to-value and eliminate scheduling bottlenecks.

data.name: home_how_title
data.value: From capture to conversion in minutes

data.name: home_step1_desc
data.value: Install the Chrome extension. Click through your product. NavTour records every screen automatically as an interactive HTML snapshot.

data.name: home_step2_desc
data.value: AI Copilot writes your guide copy, anchors tooltips to the right elements, creates branching paths, and personalizes content — all while you grab coffee.

data.name: home_step3_desc
data.value: Embed anywhere. AI analytics tell you who's engaged, score buying intent, and feed signals directly to your CRM.

data.name: home_features_title
data.value: Everything you need to demo at scale

data.name: home_feat1_title
data.value: Click through your product. AI does the rest.

data.name: home_feat1_desc
data.value: AI auto-generates a complete demo draft — guide copy, tooltip anchors, story flow, and branching logic. Trained on best practices from thousands of high-performing demos.

data.name: home_feat2_desc
data.value: Tell AI what to change: "Replace all company names with fintech brands." It handles text, dates, pricing — across all your demos, instantly.

data.name: home_feat3_desc
data.value: Dynamic variables swap company name, logo, and data fields automatically. Bulk-generate 50 custom demos from one template. AI suggests what to personalize.

data.name: home_feat4_title
data.value: AI tells you who's ready to buy.

data.name: home_feat4_desc
data.value: AI scores viewer engagement and predicts buying intent. Identifies companies viewing demos without form fills. Signals feed directly to CRM.

data.name: home_feat5_desc
data.value: Hotspots, tooltips, modals, multi-step flows, conditional branching — all without writing a single line of code.

data.name: home_feat6_desc
data.value: HubSpot, Salesforce, Marketo, Slack, Zapier, REST API. Demo data flows wherever you need it.

data.name: home_feat7_desc
data.value: Shared demo library, templates, version control, role-based permissions, and AI brand voice memory across all team members.

data.name: home_testimonial_quote
data.value: NavTour replaced our entire demo environment. Our sales team creates custom demos in minutes instead of days. The AI copilot alone saved us 20 hours a week.

data.name: home_cta_title
data.value: Let AI build, personalize, and optimize your demos — starting now

data.name: home_cta_subtitle
data.value: Free forever — 1 demo, 10 frames. No credit card. Build your first interactive demo in under 10 minutes.

data.name: cta_default_subtitle
data.value: Start building interactive demos in minutes. No credit card required.

data.name: sol_mkt_page_title
data.value: NavTour for Marketing — Interactive Demos That Convert

data.name: sol_mkt_meta_desc
data.value: Embed interactive product demos on your website, in campaigns, and on landing pages. Let prospects experience your product the moment they're interested.

data.name: sol_mkt_hero_title
data.value: Your product is amazing. But prospects can't see it until after a sales call.

data.name: sol_mkt_hero_subtitle
data.value: Embed interactive demos on your website, in campaigns, and on landing pages. Let prospects experience your product the moment they're interested.

data.name: sol_mkt_pain1_desc
data.value: Visitors bounce when they can't interact with your product. Screenshots and videos create awareness but not conviction.

data.name: sol_mkt_pain2_desc
data.value: Every prospect has to schedule a call, wait for an AE, and sit through a generic pitch before they see the product.

data.name: sol_mkt_pain3_desc
data.value: You're sending traffic to a pricing page and hoping for the best. No way to measure who's genuinely evaluating.

data.name: sol_mkt_feat1_desc
data.value: Replace static product screenshots with interactive, click-through demos. Visitors explore your product at their own pace — no form gates, no sales calls. Embed on landing pages, feature pages, or documentation.

data.name: sol_mkt_feat1_placeholder
data.value: Interactive demo embedded on landing page

data.name: sol_mkt_feat2_desc
data.value: Generate personalized demo links for every campaign segment. AI swaps company names, industry data, and use-case examples automatically. One template serves every audience.

data.name: sol_mkt_feat3_desc
data.value: AI tracks every demo interaction and scores buying intent. See which campaigns drive the most engaged viewers. Feed signals directly to HubSpot or Salesforce — no manual tagging.

data.name: sol_mkt_metrics_title
data.value: Marketing teams using NavTour see results

data.name: sol_mkt_metric3_label
data.value: of demo viewers visit pricing page

data.name: sol_mkt_cta_title
data.value: Turn your website into a product experience

data.name: sol_mkt_cta_subtitle
data.value: Embed interactive demos in minutes. Free forever.

data.name: sol_sales_page_title
data.value: NavTour for Sales — Personalized Demos That Close Deals

data.name: sol_sales_meta_desc
data.value: Send prospects a custom demo minutes after a discovery call. AI personalizes every experience with their company name, data, and use case.

data.name: sol_sales_hero_title
data.value: Generic slide decks don't close deals. Personalized demos do.

data.name: sol_sales_hero_subtitle
data.value: Send prospects a custom demo minutes after a discovery call. AI personalizes every experience with their company name, data, and use case.

data.name: sol_sales_pain1_title
data.value: Every discovery call ends the same way

data.name: sol_sales_pain1_desc
data.value: You promise to send a follow-up. Then you spend 2 hours building a custom slide deck that the prospect may never open.

data.name: sol_sales_pain2_desc
data.value: Your contact loved the demo, but they can't recreate it for their VP. The deal stalls in committee.

data.name: sol_sales_pain3_desc
data.value: You don't know if the prospect watched your recording, forwarded the deck, or ghosted you entirely.

data.name: sol_sales_feat1_desc
data.value: AI generates a prospect-specific demo from your template library. Company name, logo, industry data — all swapped automatically. Send a demo link before the discovery call even ends.

data.name: sol_sales_feat1_placeholder
data.value: AI personalizing a demo in real time

data.name: sol_sales_feat2_desc
data.value: Give your champion a demo they can share internally. It walks their VP through the value prop, highlights the relevant use case, and captures engagement from every stakeholder who views it.

data.name: sol_sales_feat2_placeholder
data.value: Champion sharing demo with buying committee

data.name: sol_sales_feat3_desc
data.value: AI tracks who viewed your demo, how long they spent, which features they explored, and whether they shared it. Intent scoring tells you which deals to prioritize and when to follow up.

data.name: sol_sales_feat3_placeholder
data.value: Deal intelligence dashboard with intent scores

data.name: sol_sales_metrics_title
data.value: Sales teams using NavTour see results

data.name: sol_sales_metric2_label
data.value: higher win rate with personalized demos

data.name: sol_sales_metric3_label
data.value: of demos are shared with 2+ stakeholders

data.name: sol_sales_cta_title
data.value: Close deals faster with AI-personalized demos

data.name: sol_sales_cta_subtitle
data.value: Start free. Send your first personalized demo today.

data.name: sol_presales_page_title
data.value: NavTour for Presales — Scale Your SE Team with AI Demos

data.name: sol_presales_meta_desc
data.value: Let NavTour handle the first demo. AI-generated self-serve experiences qualify prospects before your SEs invest a minute.

data.name: sol_presales_hero_title
data.value: Your SEs spend 80% of their time on repetitive discovery demos

data.name: sol_presales_hero_subtitle
data.value: Let NavTour handle the first demo. AI-generated self-serve experiences qualify prospects before your SEs invest a minute.

data.name: sol_presales_pain1_desc
data.value: Every deal requires SE involvement for the first demo. Your team is stretched thin, and sales cycles slow down as the pipeline grows.

data.name: sol_presales_pain2_title
data.value: Repetitive demos burn out your best people

data.name: sol_presales_pain2_desc
data.value: 80% of discovery demos cover the same features. Your senior SEs are doing work that could be automated.

data.name: sol_presales_pain3_desc
data.value: Each SE builds demos differently. No version control, no consistency, no way to measure what works.

data.name: sol_presales_feat1_desc
data.value: Let prospects explore your product through AI-generated interactive demos before the sales call. Qualify interest, identify their use case, and give SEs context before they ever pick up the phone.

data.name: sol_presales_feat2_desc
data.value: Build reusable demo templates for every vertical, use case, and persona. Version control ensures everyone uses the latest. AI brand voice keeps messaging consistent across the team.

data.name: sol_presales_feat2_placeholder
data.value: Demo template library with version history

data.name: sol_presales_feat3_desc
data.value: See which demos perform best, which SEs drive the most engagement, and which templates convert. AI suggests optimizations based on aggregate data across your entire team.

data.name: sol_presales_metrics_title
data.value: Presales teams using NavTour see results

data.name: sol_presales_cta_title
data.value: Scale your presales team without hiring

data.name: sol_presales_cta_subtitle
data.value: AI handles the repetitive work. Your SEs handle the deals that matter.

data.name: customers_meta_desc
data.value: See how teams at leading companies use NavTour interactive demos to close deals faster, convert more visitors, and onboard customers at scale.

data.name: customers_title
data.value: See how teams use NavTour to close more deals

data.name: customers_subtitle
data.value: From startups to enterprise, product-led teams trust NavTour for interactive demos.

data.name: customers_cs1_challenge
data.value: Sales team spent 3 hours per custom demo. Pipeline was growing faster than the team could support.

data.name: customers_cs1_solution
data.value: NavTour's AI Copilot generates personalized demos in under 2 minutes. SEs shifted from demo building to strategic selling.

data.name: customers_cs1_result
data.value: 40% increase in close rate. Demo creation time dropped from 3 hours to 2 minutes.

data.name: customers_testimonial1_quote
data.value: NavTour is the highest-ROI tool we've added this year. Our reps send personalized demos before the discovery call even ends.

data.name: customers_cs2_challenge
data.value: Compliance requirements made live product demos risky. Prospects needed to see the product but couldn't access PHI.

data.name: customers_cs2_solution
data.value: Interactive demos with synthetic data. Prospects explore the full workflow without compliance concerns.

data.name: customers_cs2_result
data.value: Sales cycle shortened by 3 weeks. 100% compliant demo environment.

data.name: customers_testimonial2_quote
data.value: We embedded NavTour demos on every product page. Engagement tripled overnight. It's like having a sales rep on every page.

data.name: customers_cs3_challenge
data.value: Marketing had no way to show the product on the website. Every prospect required a scheduled demo call.

data.name: customers_cs3_solution
data.value: Embedded interactive demos on landing pages. AI personalization shows relevant features based on visitor segment.

data.name: customers_cs3_result
data.value: 67% of website visitors interact with demos. Marketing-sourced pipeline up 52%.

data.name: customers_cta_title
data.value: Join the teams already winning with NavTour

data.name: customers_cta_subtitle
data.value: Start free. See results in your first week.

data.name: blog_meta_desc
data.value: Insights on interactive demos, AI-powered sales, and product-led growth from the NavTour team.

data.name: blog_subtitle
data.value: Insights on interactive demos, AI-powered sales, and product-led growth.

data.name: blog_post1_title
data.value: Introducing AI Copilot: Build demos 10x faster

data.name: blog_post1_excerpt
data.value: NavTour's AI Copilot automatically generates interactive demos from your product capture...

data.name: blog_post2_title
data.value: How to Send a Personalized Demo in Under 60 Seconds

data.name: blog_post2_excerpt
data.value: The best sales teams don't wait for SE availability. Here's how to use AI personalization...

data.name: blog_post3_title
data.value: Why Interactive Demos Convert 3x Better Than Video

data.name: blog_post3_excerpt
data.value: We analyzed 10,000 demo sessions. The data is clear: interactive beats passive every time...

data.name: blog_post4_title
data.value: How CloudScale Cut Demo Creation Time by 98%

data.name: blog_post4_excerpt
data.value: From 3 hours to 2 minutes: CloudScale's sales team transformed their demo workflow...

data.name: blog_post5_title
data.value: Building a Chrome Extension for DOM Snapshot Capture

data.name: blog_post5_excerpt
data.value: A technical deep dive into how NavTour captures interactive HTML snapshots...

data.name: blog_post6_excerpt
data.value: Your buyers expect personalized experiences. Here's the technology stack that delivers...

data.name: contact_meta_desc
data.value: Get in touch with the NavTour team. Questions about pricing, demos, or partnerships — we'd love to hear from you.

data.name: contact_subheading
data.value: Fill out the form and we'll get back to you within 2 hours.

data.name: contact_thank_you_desc
data.value: We'll get back to you within 2 hours.

data.name: contact_step1_desc
data.value: A real person from our team will reply to your message. No bots, no auto-responders.

data.name: contact_step2_desc
data.value: We'll learn about your use case and show you how NavTour can help.

data.name: contact_step3_desc
data.value: See NavTour configured for your specific product and audience.

data.name: contact_testimonial_quote
data.value: From first contact to live demos in under a week. The NavTour team made onboarding effortless.

data.name: security_meta_desc
data.value: NavTour security: SOC 2 compliant, AES-256 encryption, GDPR ready, 99.9% uptime SLA, Azure hosted.

data.name: security_subtitle
data.value: NavTour is built on industry-leading security practices. Your data is protected at every layer.

data.name: security_data_p1
data.value: Your data is encrypted at rest (AES-256) and in transit (TLS 1.3). We implement strict access controls, regular key rotation, and comprehensive audit logging. Demo content is isolated per tenant with row-level security.

data.name: security_data_p2
data.value: Every database query is scoped to your tenant. There is no mechanism to access another organization's data, even in error. Encryption keys are managed via Azure Key Vault with automated rotation policies.

data.name: security_infra_p1
data.value: NavTour runs on Microsoft Azure with multi-region redundancy. Automated backups, disaster recovery, and 99.9% uptime SLA. Infrastructure is managed via code with automated security scanning on every deployment.

data.name: security_infra_p2
data.value: We use Azure App Service, Azure SQL, and Azure Blob Storage with geo-redundant replication. Every deployment passes through automated SAST and dependency vulnerability scans before reaching production.

data.name: security_compliance_p1
data.value: NavTour is SOC 2 Type II compliant. We undergo annual third-party audits covering security, availability, and confidentiality. We also comply with GDPR, CCPA, and maintain a current Data Processing Agreement (DPA).

data.name: security_compliance_p2
data.value: Our SOC 2 report is available under NDA for enterprise customers evaluating NavTour. Contact our team to request a copy along with our completed security questionnaire.

data.name: security_privacy_p1
data.value: We collect only what's necessary. Demo viewer data is anonymized by default. You control data retention policies. We never sell customer data. Full GDPR data subject rights supported: access, deletion, portability.

data.name: security_privacy_p2
data.value: NavTour does not use customer data for model training or any purpose beyond delivering the service. When you delete your account, all associated data is permanently purged within 30 days.

data.name: security_disclosure_p1
data.value: We maintain a responsible disclosure program for security researchers. If you discover a vulnerability, please email security@navtour.com. We respond within 24 hours and never pursue legal action against good-faith reporters.

data.name: security_disclosure_p2
data.value: We appreciate the security research community and are committed to working with researchers to verify, reproduce, and respond to legitimate reports. Critical issues are triaged immediately.

data.name: security_cta_subtitle
data.value: Our team is happy to discuss security practices, share our SOC 2 report, or review your compliance requirements.

data.name: pricing_subtitle
data.value: Start free. Scale as you grow. No credit card required.

data.name: pricing_free_desc
data.value: Try it out — no credit card

data.name: pricing_faq1_q
data.value: Is the free plan really free?

data.name: pricing_faq1_a
data.value: Yes. No credit card, no trial period, no expiration. Build 1 demo with up to 10 frames — free forever. We believe in letting you experience NavTour before you commit.

data.name: pricing_faq2_q
data.value: What AI features are included in the free plan?

data.name: pricing_faq2_a
data.value: The free plan includes basic AI Copilot — AI will generate an initial demo draft when you capture your product. For advanced AI features like smart editing, personalization at scale, and intent scoring, you'll need Starter or Growth.

data.name: pricing_faq3_q
data.value: Can I switch plans at any time?

data.name: pricing_faq3_a
data.value: Absolutely. Upgrade or downgrade whenever you want. Upgrades take effect immediately with prorated billing. Downgrades apply at your next billing cycle. No cancellation fees.

data.name: pricing_faq4_a
data.value: Annual billing saves 20% compared to monthly. You're billed once per year. If you need to cancel mid-year, we'll refund the remaining months.

data.name: pricing_faq5_q
data.value: What happens when I hit my demo limit?

data.name: pricing_faq5_a
data.value: Your existing demos stay live — we never disable your content. You'll get a notification suggesting an upgrade. If you need a temporary bump, reach out and we'll work something out.

data.name: pricing_faq6_q
data.value: Do you offer startup or nonprofit discounts?

data.name: pricing_faq6_a
data.value: Yes. 50% off Starter and Growth for startups under $5M ARR and registered nonprofits. Contact us with your details.

data.name: pricing_faq7_q
data.value: Can I migrate from Navattic, Storylane, or another platform?

data.name: pricing_faq7_a
data.value: Yes. We offer free migration assistance. Our team will help recreate your demos in NavTour and ensure a smooth transition.

data.name: pricing_faq8_q
data.value: What kind of support do I get?

data.name: pricing_faq8_a
data.value: Free and Starter include community support. Starter adds email support with 24-hour response. Growth includes priority support with 4-hour response. Enterprise gets a dedicated CSM and SLA.

data.name: pricing_faq9_a
data.value: Yes. NavTour is SOC 2 compliant, uses AES-256 encryption at rest and in transit, and runs on Azure infrastructure. Enterprise customers can deploy on their own infrastructure.

data.name: pricing_faq10_q
data.value: Can I use the API to integrate with my CRM?

data.name: pricing_faq10_a
data.value: Starter includes REST API access. Growth adds pre-built CRM integrations (Salesforce, HubSpot) and Zapier. Enterprise supports custom integrations.

data.name: pricing_cta_subtitle
data.value: Free forever. No credit card required.

data.name: product_title
data.value: The complete platform for interactive demos

data.name: product_subtitle
data.value: From AI-powered capture to analytics that predict buying intent — everything your team needs to build, personalize, and measure product demos at scale.

data.name: product_feat1_desc
data.value: Click through your product with the Chrome extension. AI Copilot automatically generates a complete demo — guide copy, tooltip placement, story flow, and branching logic. Trained on patterns from thousands of high-performing demos.

data.name: product_feat2_desc
data.value: Tell AI what to change: 'Replace all account names with healthcare companies.' AI rewrites demo data, updates screenshots, and fixes stale dates and pricing across all your demos — instantly.

data.name: product_feat3_desc
data.value: Dynamic variables swap company name, logo, industry data, and role-specific content automatically. AI suggests what to personalize based on the viewer's company. Bulk-generate dozens of prospect-specific demos in minutes.

data.name: product_feat4_desc
data.value: AI identifies which demo interactions predict buying intent. Account deanonymization reveals companies without form fills. Engagement scoring feeds directly to Salesforce, HubSpot, or any CRM.

data.name: product_feat5_title
data.value: Capture any web app in clicks

data.name: product_feat5_desc
data.value: Install the extension. Navigate your product. Each click saves a complete HTML/CSS snapshot as an interactive frame. Works on single-page apps, traditional sites, and even complex dashboards.

data.name: product_feat6_desc
data.value: Add tooltips, modals, hotspots, blur overlays, click zones, and numbered badges — all with drag-and-drop. Create multi-step flows with conditional branching. Zero engineering required.

data.name: product_feat7_title
data.value: Your demos, wherever your buyers are

data.name: product_feat7_desc
data.value: Embed on your website, in email campaigns, on ad landing pages, in sales decks, and in help documentation. One demo, every channel. Responsive and fast-loading.

data.name: product_feat8_desc
data.value: AI analyzes your demo against conversion benchmarks: step count, copy length, CTA placement, completion rates. Get specific suggestions: 'This demo has 18 steps — top performers average 10-12.'

data.name: product_feat9_desc
data.value: AI suggests conditional branching paths based on viewer role and industry. Auto-generates 'choose your own adventure' flows from a single linear capture. Recommends which features to highlight for each persona.

data.name: product_feat10_desc
data.value: Shared demo library with templates, version control, and role-based permissions. AI brand voice memory ensures consistent tone across all team members. Build once, reuse everywhere.

data.name: product_feat11_desc
data.value: Pre-built integrations with HubSpot, Salesforce, Marketo, Slack, and Zapier. Full REST API for custom workflows. Webhooks push events in real time.

data.name: product_feat12_desc
data.value: Create demos in English, Spanish, Portuguese, and more. AI auto-translates demo content while preserving your brand voice. Serve the right language based on viewer locale.

data.name: product_cta_subtitle
data.value: Build your first AI-powered demo in under 10 minutes. Free forever.

data.name: ai_title
data.value: AI that builds, edits, and optimizes your demos

data.name: ai_subtitle
data.value: From auto-generation to smart personalization, NavTour AI handles every step of the demo lifecycle — so you can focus on closing deals.

data.name: ai_cap1_title
data.value: Click through your product. AI does the rest.

data.name: ai_cap1_desc
data.value: Walk through your product with the Chrome extension. AI Copilot watches your flow and automatically generates a complete interactive demo — writing guide copy, anchoring tooltips to the right elements, structuring the narrative, and creating logical branching paths. Trained on patterns from thousands of high-performing demos, it knows what converts.

data.name: ai_cap2_desc
data.value: No more clicking through screens to update data. Tell AI what to change: "Replace all company names with fintech brands" or "Update the pricing table to Q2 numbers." AI modifies the visual content directly. It also runs continuous "freshness checks" — detecting and replacing stale dates, outdated pricing, and obsolete data across all your demos automatically.

data.name: ai_cap3_desc
data.value: Every prospect sees THEIR version of your product. Dynamic variables automatically swap company name, logo, industry-specific data, and role-relevant content. AI analyzes each viewer's company and suggests what to personalize. Generate 50 prospect-specific demos from a single template in minutes — each one tailored to resonate.

data.name: ai_cap4_title
data.value: AI tells you who's ready to buy

data.name: ai_cap4_desc
data.value: Go beyond page views. AI analyzes demo interaction patterns to predict buying intent — which clicks signal genuine interest, which paths indicate evaluation stage, which drop-offs mean disqualification. Account deanonymization identifies companies viewing your demos without requiring form fills. Every signal feeds directly to your CRM.

data.name: ai_cap5_desc
data.value: AI scores your demo against conversion benchmarks from thousands of top-performing demos. It checks step count, copy length, CTA placement, completion rates, and engagement patterns. Then it tells you exactly what to fix: "This demo has 18 steps — top performers average 10-12. Consider combining steps 5-7."

data.name: ai_cap6_desc
data.value: AI analyzes your demo content and suggests conditional branching paths based on viewer role, industry, and company size. It auto-generates "choose your own adventure" flows from a single linear capture — no manual logic required. Each persona sees only the features and workflows most relevant to them.

data.name: ai_cap7_title
data.value: Consistent tone across every team member

data.name: ai_cap7_desc
data.value: AI learns your company's communication style — tone, terminology, formatting preferences. When any team member creates or edits a demo, AI ensures the copy matches your brand voice. No more inconsistent messaging across regions, teams, or demo versions.

data.name: ai_compare_subtitle
data.value: The most complete AI demo platform on the market.

data.name: ai_bottom_cta_title
data.value: See AI in action — build your first demo free

data.name: ai_bottom_cta_subtitle
data.value: No credit card. No training required. AI builds your first demo in under 5 minutes.

data.name: about_meta_desc
data.value: NavTour is built by a team obsessed with one idea: the best way to sell software is to let people use it.

data.name: about_title
data.value: We believe every product deserves to sell itself

data.name: about_subtitle
data.value: NavTour was built by a team obsessed with one idea: the best way to sell software is to let people use it.

data.name: about_mission_p1
data.value: We're building the platform that makes interactive product demos effortless. AI handles the repetitive work — capturing, writing, personalizing — so your team can focus on what matters: building relationships and closing deals.

data.name: about_mission_p2
data.value: We started NavTour because we saw how much time sales and marketing teams wasted on demo logistics. Scheduling calls, building slide decks, recording videos that nobody watches. There had to be a better way.

data.name: about_value1_desc
data.value: We build tools that we'd want to use ourselves. Every feature ships because it solves a real problem, not because a competitor has it.

data.name: about_value2_desc
data.value: We use AI to eliminate busywork, not to replace human judgment. AI builds your demos. You build your relationships.

data.name: about_value3_desc
data.value: If it takes more than 5 minutes to learn, we haven't finished building it. Complexity is a bug, not a feature.

data.name: about_team_desc
data.value: We're a small, focused team of engineers, designers, and go-to-market operators who've built and sold SaaS products ourselves. We know the pain because we've lived it.

data.name: about_cta_subtitle
data.value: We're always looking for talented people who care about building great products.

data.name: usecases_meta_desc
data.value: See how marketing, sales, presales, customer success, product marketing, and growth teams use NavTour interactive demos.

data.name: usecases_title
data.value: Interactive demos for every team, every stage

data.name: usecases_subtitle
data.value: From first-touch marketing to post-sale onboarding, NavTour fits every go-to-market workflow.

data.name: usecases_card1_desc
data.value: Embed interactive demos on landing pages, in email campaigns, and on ad destinations. Convert passive visitors into active pipeline.

data.name: usecases_card2_desc
data.value: Send AI-personalized demo links after every discovery call. Each prospect sees their company name, data, and relevant features.

data.name: usecases_card3_desc
data.value: Build reusable demo templates for every vertical and use case. Self-serve discovery demos reduce repetitive SE work by 60%.

data.name: usecases_card4_desc
data.value: Self-serve product tours for new customers. Guide users through features, reduce time-to-value, and cut support tickets.

data.name: usecases_card5_desc
data.value: Create interactive demos for new feature launches. Enable sales with ready-to-share product experiences for every release.

data.name: usecases_card6_desc
data.value: Use AI analytics to understand which demo interactions predict buying intent. Optimize flows based on engagement data.

data.name: usecases_how1_desc
data.value: Record your product once with the Chrome extension. AI generates demos, and you share them across website, email, sales, support — every channel from a single capture.

data.name: usecases_how2_desc
data.value: AI swaps company names, logos, industry data, and feature highlights for every prospect. Generate 50 unique demos from one template — each one feels hand-crafted.

data.name: usecases_how3_desc
data.value: AI tracks engagement, scores buying intent, and identifies accounts without form fills. Know who's ready to buy before they raise their hand.

data.name: usecases_cta_title
data.value: See NavTour in action for your use case

data.name: usecases_cta_subtitle
data.value: Start free. Build your first demo in under 5 minutes.
